title: Senate Republicans defeat War Powers Resolution for 5th time, 52-47
snippet: Senate Republicans defeat War Powers Resolution for the 5th time with a 52-47 vote on April 23. Democrats have been unable to force a withdrawal timeline on the Iran campaign. May 1 marks the 60-day deadline under the War Powers Act. Legal debate continues over whether the ceasefire pauses the constitutional clock. Sen. Kaine leads opposition effort.
tag_reason: 5th Senate defeat of WPR is new vote. May 1 deadline approaching adds urgency. Legal clock debate is new analytical dimension.
